findings: Full suite (tests/keel-state-describe.test.cjs): 44 / 44 passed, 0 failed, 0 errors. Runner final line: '44 / 44 passed'

AC-2 tests (3 assertions): all PASS — exit 1 with 'FAIL: no manifest for story' die() message (not unhandled throw), story ID in stderr, contrast test (valid story has separator, missing story has empty stdout).

AC-3 tests (6 assertions): all PASS — sub-hour 'Xm Ys' pattern match, sub-hour does NOT use 'Xh Ym', multi-hour 'Xh Ym' pattern match, '1h 2m' for 62-minute idle (floor rounding), absent updated_at shows 'unknown', exactly 60 minutes shows '1h 0m'.

AC-4 tests (4 assertions): all PASS — 'product-owner' in completed phases, current_phase=5 shows 'tdd-red' via AGENTS[4], halted=true shows WARNING/HALTED line, gate events N/M matches manifest values.

AC-5 regression tests (22 assertions): all PASS — status --all exit 0, valid JSON, array type, 2-story fleet count, FLEET-X correct fields, FLEET-Y defect scope, exact field projection, alphabetical sort, empty directory emits [], single-story status exit 0, valid JSON, all 10 required fields present.
Pre-existing test scripts/test-halt-message-paths.cjs: PASS (1/1 — both halt/stale messages correctly instruct 'node ~/.keel/bin/keel-state.cjs resume').

Pre-existing test scripts/test-keel-state.cjs: 21/22 passed. 1 pre-existing failure: 'defect scope: final gate reports complete' — expects /6 -> complete/ but output is 'PASS recorded: phase 6 -> 7'. This regression was introduced by commit 28ab0fd (v3.13.0, 'feat(pipeline): 11-phase sequential pipeline') which changed defect scope from [1,4,5,6] to [1,4,5,6,7,9] — phase 6 is no longer the last defect-scope phase. The KEEL-103 cmdDescribe implementation does not touch cmdGate, SCOPES, or any gate logic. This is a pre-existing regression predating KEEL-103.

KEEL-103 introduced 0 new test failures. The pre-existing failure in test-keel-state.cjs exists on master before any KEEL-103 changes (git log confirms test-keel-state.cjs was last modified at commit 172989f/v3.12.0, before the scope-breaking v3.13.0 commit 28ab0fd).

No automated coverage tool (no Jest/nyc/c8 configured for this project). Coverage assessed manually by mapping each of the 73 executable lines in cmdDescribe to the test assertions that exercise them.
No new npm dependencies introduced. cmdDescribe uses only fs, path, AGENTS, SCOPES, DEFAULT_MAX_GATES — all pre-existing in keel-state.cjs.
cmdDescribe is lock-free (read-only) per ADR-001/ADR-002 — no test action conflicts with this rule.
decisions: Pre-existing failure in test-keel-state.cjs ('defect scope: final gate reports complete') is documented as a pre-existing regression from v3.13.0 — not caused by KEEL-103. The KEEL-103 cmdDescribe implementation is entirely isolated from gate/scope logic.

No test assertions were relaxed. No tests were skipped or commented out.
